## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type of change

- [ ] Core skill change
- [ ] Adapter change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Eval suite
- [ ] Workflow or tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] One PR contains one logical change.
- [ ] Internal links still work.
- [ ] `markdownlint .` passes.
- [ ] `yamllint .` passes.
- [ ] `make eval` passes.
- [ ] Changelog updated if behavior changes.

## Eval results

Classification accuracy:

Output contract adherence:

Trap-case self-deactivation:

Model/provider used:

## Notes for reviewers

Mention any compatibility risks, uncertain behavior, or adapter-specific limitations.
